output: {"match_id":"m006","winner":"A","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation well with similar pilot signal. A is slightly stronger: it bundles three already-run checks, creates social pressure to re-run despite immutable context, and tests exact recall/attribution across tools. B is good but more ambiguous because Kubernetes pod state can genuinely change over time, making a fresh check more defensible."}
